body:
# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The local-openai availability/bootstrap line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-PRV-046](task-0113): Provider Data Masking

## Purpose

Implement provider data masking.

## Scope

- Masking rules
- Application
- Unmasking

## Implementation

1. Define rules
2. Apply masking
3. Handle unmasking

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Rules defined
2. Masking applied
3. Unmasking works
